title: Establish performance baseline
description: Run the full pipeline 3 times in Fabric, record activity-level durations, and identify bottlenecks. Output: performance_baseline.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Pipeline run 3 times to average out variance
Activity-level durations recorded for bronze, silver, gold stages
Slowest activities identified as candidates for optimization
notes: Erik runs in Fabric UI; Claude prepares the baseline.md template if helpful.
Measure before optimizing — avoid premature optimization.
Each run should use a fresh cache state to avoid skew.
